description: When an IFU claim is narrowed in scope (e.g., 'all vascular procedures' → 'peripheral vascular procedures only'), the transformation MUST record a reason. Narrowing without reason is not acceptable.

input.ifu_text: Device is indicated for hemostasis in all vascular surgical procedures.
input.evidence_population: adult patients undergoing peripheral vascular procedures (femoral, popliteal)
input.reason_for_narrowing: Available clinical evidence is limited to peripheral vascular procedures. No data for carotid, aortic, or pediatric populations.

expected_expert_reasoning.narrowed_scope: peripheral vascular procedures (femoral, popliteal) in adult patients

stage_5_final_cer_claim.transformation_reason: Narrowed from 'all vascular procedures' to 'peripheral vascular procedures only' — evidence limited to femoral/popliteal sites. No data for carotid, aortic, or pediatric populations.
